executive_summary: - Added PocketBase handler to integrate with MindsDB via REST API.
- Enables querying PocketBase collections through MindsDB SQL queries.
- Includes authentication and connection handling for PocketBase.
- Updates documentation and file structure for new features.
- Fixes and adds tests for the new integration.

change_units.title: Pocketbase Handler
change_units.description: Adds a PocketBase handler that authenticates via PocketBase REST API and translates MindsDB SQL queries into PocketBase calls.
change_units.inferred_intent: Non-breaking change to add new functionality
change_units.evidence: Commit #11873, PR description mentions adding a PocketBase handler.

risks_and_concerns: - Potential issues with PocketBase authentication and token management.
- Risk of data privacy if PocketBase credentials are exposed.
- Dependency on MindsDB being available and properly configured.
